headline: NextEra Energy Outpaces Industry in YTD: How to Play the Stock?
summary: NEE is up 5.3% YTD on strong execution, a growing customer base and clean-energy buildout - but its premium valuation may deter new buyers.

headline: Hut 8 hires former NextEra Energy IR lead Mark Eidelman as it pursues investment-grade rating
summary: Hut 8 appointed Mark Eidelman as head of investor relations and senior vice president of strategic finance.

raw.headline: Hut 8 hires former NextEra Energy IR lead Mark Eidelman as it pursues investment-grade rating
raw.summary: Hut 8 appointed Mark Eidelman as head of investor relations and senior vice president of strategic finance.

headline: Hut 8 Appoints Mark Eidelman as Head of Investor Relations
summary: Hut 8 Corp. (Nasdaq, TSX: HUT) ("Hut 8" or the "Company"), an energy infrastructure platform integrating power, digital infrastructure, and compute at scale to fuel next-generation, energy-intensive technologies, today announced the appointment of Mark Eidelman as Head of Investor Relations and Senior Vice President of Strategic Finance. Eidelman will report to CFO Sean Glennan and lead the Company's strategic finance and investor relations functions.
